titles.title: Help me Lord To Be Like You

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I want to live, Lord the way You want me to live I want to give the way You want me to give I want to love, Lord the way You want me to love Help me, Lord, to be like You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know that I am the salt of this earth And I know that I am the light of this world But Lord, I really need Your quickening power To help me to be like You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus said, " Let your light so shine before men, that they may see your good works, and glorify your Father which is in heaven." But Lord, I really need Your quickening power To help me to be like You
